use_codes.desc: FOR THE TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH PRIMARY BILIARY CIRRHOSIS

indications.text:
URSO 250 and URSO Forte (ursodiol) tablets are indicated for the treatment of patients with
primary biliary cholangitis (PBC).

URSO 250® and URSO Forte® (ursodiol) tablets are indicated for the treatment of patients with primary
biliary cirrhosis.
